description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with a matte brown and black color scheme, designed for urban operations. The vehicle is equipped with a large, dual-barrel weapon mounted on the rear bed, supported by a reinforced frame and visible control panels. Its open-top cabin includes two seats, a steering wheel, and a dashboard with red accents, providing quick access for occupants. The wheels are oversized and hexagonal, with patterned hubcaps suggesting reinforced, all-terrain capability. The vehicle's exterior is constructed from thick, flat panels, likely armored, with sloped surfaces for deflection. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and rapid deployment in hostile environments.
description: A heavily armored, open-top tactical vehicle with a large dual-barrel weapon mounted on the rear and oversized, reinforced wheels. Its angular brown and black body is built for durability and urban combat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular, armored nose, wide stance, and windshield with red-tinted glass.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, large weapon mount, and hexagonal wheels with patterned hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the dual-barrel weapon system, open cargo bed, and rear armor plating.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the weapon mount, open cabin, and reinforced wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large dual-barrel weapon mount located on the rear cargo bed, fixed forward-facing.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible armor plating covers the front, sides, and rear of the vehicle with thick, flat, and sloped panels for enhanced protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid brown and black color scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four oversized, hexagonal, reinforced tires with patterned hubcaps and all-terrain tread.
